message:
Address code review: wire headers, fix mergeEnv, add initMCP timeout

- Wire configured headers into SSE/HTTP transports via headerRoundTripper
- Fix mergeEnv to replace (not duplicate) existing env vars
- Add 30-second timeout to MCP server initialization
- Add TOCTOU comment on collision check (safe: single-threaded init)
- Add tests for transportForConfig and mergeEnv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
